source_label: Reka Core, Flash, and Edge technical report (arXiv 2404.12387)
notes: Reka AI — multimodal frontier-model lab (Reka Core / Flash / Edge). Reka publishes no official pronunciation, so usage is genuinely split. The name evokes the word for 'river' in two languages that pronounce it differently: South Slavic река gives REK-uh (short e), while Hungarian Réka gives REE-kuh (long ee); English speakers also default to REE-kuh. STRESS on first syllable: REK-uh or REE-kuh.
